uplink.description: fPort 2 frame, typical indoor reading (23.45 C, 47.18% RH, 1005 hPa, 500 ppm CO2)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame. Bytes hand-built so air.pressure (byte+845) and CO2 land inside vocabulary bounds; expected.data is the normalized form of the upstream reference decoder output (TheThingsNetwork/lorawan-devices vendor/sensedge/senstick-pure.js, run as an oracle): Status->status, Temperature->air.temperature, Humidity->air.relativeHumidity, AirPressure->air.pressure, eCO2->air.co2, IAQ/StaticIAQ/BreathVOC/IAQAccuracy->camelCase extras.

uplink.description: fPort 2 frame, sub-zero temperature (signed) and pressure ceiling (-12.34 C, 26% RH, 1100 hPa, 800 ppm CO2)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame exercising the signed two's-complement temperature branch (0xFB2E -> -12.34 C) and the pressure ceiling (byte 0xFF -> 1100 hPa). expected.data is the normalized form of the upstream reference decoder output run as an oracle.
Upstream returns { errors: ['unknown FPort'] } for any fPort other than 2; our codec mirrors that, appending the offending port number.
